dinner.text: Two who share a symbol share a sky.
Where one node shines, another listens — find your mirror.
Constellations are drawn by the lines between people.
1 → 2 → 3. Numbers in sequence point the way home.
An aligned bearing across constellations is an omen.
Two nodes bearing opposite directions form a polar axis.
Perpendicular currents cross — a near-harmonic match.
A full constellation aligned speaks loudest.
When every number of a constellation is present, the chain completes.
Internal tension sharpens a constellation — opposition within binds tighter.

rare.text: Opposites held in balance unlock the gate.
Two mirrors facing each other see infinity.
Cross-stellar arcs bend space — an eclipse is forming.
Two Polaris anchors in contact: the sky steadies.
Six or more constellations converge — the eclipse approaches.
When someone you named meets you, recognition echoes back.

terminal.text: The final key: map each star to its bearing.
Twelve constellations. Four cardinal winds. One mapping.
Polaris guides — follow the anchors first.
POLARIS ACQUIRED — ALL CONSTELLATIONS ALIGNED — MIDNIGHT ECLIPSE COMPLETE

SO.small: Warmth gathers where the Socials orbit.
SO.major: The Socials are the hearth — five nodes, one fire.

CO.small: Stories ripple outward from the Content team.
CO.major: Communication anchors memory — five voices, one signal.

XX.small: Some stars travel in pairs, guided by another.
XX.major: The +1 constellation is the shadow of every other.

AR.small: Layers fold over reality — AR is near.
AR.major: Six AR nodes fold past and future into one frame.

OU.small: Outreach extends a hand beyond the orbit.
OU.major: Small team, long reach — Outreach threads new stars into the sky.

FI.small: Numbers balance. Finance steadies the orbit.
FI.major: Three Finance nodes keep every other constellation in motion.

UX.major: Four UX nodes draw the lines the rest of us walk.

AI.small: Thought moves silently through the AI network.
AI.major: Seven AI nodes — a mind distributed across the sky.

RE.small: Research asks the questions the sky cannot.
RE.major: Eight researchers — the constellation that questions itself.

IN.small: Infrastructure holds the invisible scaffolding aloft.
IN.major: Four IN nodes — the frame behind every star.

PM.small: Two anchors, one orbit — Project Management binds all.
PM.major: PM is the North Star — every constellation answers to its pull.

HW.small: Hardware hums beneath the surface of everything.
HW.major: Eight Hardware nodes — the physical weight that makes the dream real.

nominationFlavors.mvp: An MVP whisper travels between them — biggest-impact resonance.
nominationFlavors.trust: Trust acknowledged — you'd spacewalk with this one.
nominationFlavors.gemini: The team kept moving because of this meeting.
nominationFlavors.polaris: POLARIS AWARD echo — one shaped the other this year.
nominationFlavors.mentee: A mentee node crosses its mentor's orbit.
nominationFlavors.mentor: A mentor node amplifies its mentee's signal.
